---
pagetitle: "Blog - Thinh Ong"
description: "Writing on infectious disease modelling, R, and the craft of research."
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  id: postlist
  template: listing-mosaic.ejs
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="pg">
  <!-- blog index: hero, topic dropdown, listing -->
  <div class="pg-hero">
    <div class="pg-hero__head">
      <span class="pg-eyebrow">Writing</span>
      <h1 class="pg-title">Blog <span class="pg-title-thin">&amp; Notes</span></h1>
    </div>
    <div class="pg-hero__aside">
      <p class="pg-lead">A place to think out loud about disease modelling, code, and the work of science.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="blg-filter" id="blg-filter">
    <button class="blg-fbtn" id="blg-fbtn" type="button" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false">
      <span class="blg-fdot" id="blg-fdot" hidden></span>
      <span class="blg-flabel" id="blg-flabel">All posts</span>
      <svg class="blg-fchev" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
    </button>
    <div class="blg-fmenu" id="blg-fmenu" role="listbox" aria-label="Filter by topic"></div>
  </div>
```

::: {#postlist}
:::

```{=html}
</section>

<script>
(function () {
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  var grid = document.getElementById('blg-grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.blg-card'));

  // entrance reveal (opacity + transform only)
  if (!reduce && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    grid.classList.add('anim');
    var rev = new IntersectionObserver(function (es) {
      es.forEach(function (e) { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('in'); rev.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.1 });
    cards.forEach(function (t) { rev.observe(t); });
  }

  // topic dropdown, built from the topics that actually have posts
  var wrap = document.getElementById('blg-filter');
  var btn = document.getElementById('blg-fbtn');
  var menu = document.getElementById('blg-fmenu');
  var flabel = document.getElementById('blg-flabel');
  var fdot = document.getElementById('blg-fdot');
  if (!wrap || !btn || !menu) return;

  var META = {
    modelling: ['Modelling', '#3a6fd6'], code: ['R & code', '#2a9490'],
    academia: ['Academia', '#5a62d4'], productivity: ['Productivity', '#2f9a72'],
    reflections: ['Reflections', '#9466a0'], leadership: ['Leadership', '#5c7aa0']
  };
  var used = [];
  cards.forEach(function (c) { var t = c.getAttribute('data-topic'); if (t && used.indexOf(t) < 0) used.push(t); });
  var opts = [{ f: 'all', label: 'All posts', color: '' }].concat(used.map(function (t) {
    var m = META[t] || [t.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + t.slice(1), '#8a929b'];
    return { f: t, label: m[0], color: m[1] };
  }));
  menu.innerHTML = opts.map(function (o) {
    return '<button type="button" class="blg-fopt' + (o.f === 'all' ? ' active' : '') + '" data-filter="' + o.f + '">' +
      (o.color ? '<span class="blg-fopt-dot" style="background:' + o.color + '"></span>' : '<span class="blg-fopt-dot blg-fopt-all"></span>') +
      o.label + '</button>';
  }).join('');

  function closeMenu() { wrap.classList.remove('open'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); }
  function openMenu() { wrap.classList.add('open'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); }
  btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) { e.stopPropagation(); wrap.classList.contains('open') ? closeMenu() : openMenu(); });
  menu.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var b = e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('.blg-fopt') : null;
    if (!b) return;
    var f = b.getAttribute('data-filter');
    menu.querySelectorAll('.blg-fopt').forEach(function (x) { x.classList.toggle('active', x === b); });
    flabel.textContent = b.textContent.trim();
    var o = opts.filter(function (x) { return x.f === f; })[0];
    if (o && o.color) { fdot.style.background = o.color; fdot.hidden = false; } else { fdot.hidden = true; }
    cards.forEach(function (c) { c.hidden = !(f === 'all' || c.getAttribute('data-topic') === f); });
    closeMenu();
  });
  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) { if (!wrap.contains(e.target)) closeMenu(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMenu(); });
})();
</script>
```
